entry.title: Crash2 v0.4.0
entry.content:
Number goes up to v0.4.0, more features, here's what's new:
### Life-Sanity: - Adds 42 checks for collecting free-standing lives (this doesn't include lives spawned from boxes)
### Life Count Checks: - Option to add checks for reaching certain life counts - This can be any combination of numbers from 5-99 - The randomization logic will consider higher life counts as occurring "later" - This effect is accomplished by making the logic think that higher life counts require a larger amount of crystals
### Bug Fixes: - Added missing logic for regular exits when Gimmick Lock is enabled - The client will now print errors if you reset the console or connect before the game loads, notifying you to restart/reconnect the client
### Death Link: ### Gimmick Lock: ### Location Groups: - If you haven't kept up with the pre-releases up to this point, you can find their [release notes here](https://github.com/Sim10XXX/C2AP/releases) for more information on these features, and other bug fixes
### Known Issues: - When using warp randomizer, exiting Totally Fly always puts you in the 4th warp room, which can give access to the 4th warp room early - Respawning at the last checkpoint without Polar in each Polar level can result in a double-death - Going through a Polar/Jetpack level without Polar/Jetpack unlocked can sometimes crash the game - This is due to limitations of the game itself (since you're not expected to be running around as regular Crash) - Also use [GitHub issues](https://github.com/Sim10XXX/C2AP/issues) or the [Crash 2 AP thread](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1371461990794657863) to report bugs or suggest stuff

entry.title: pokemon_stadium v0.6.0
entry.content: Added new options for setting the badges required to open Victory Road and setting how many GLC keys are in the starting inventory.

entry.title: Sonic Adventure DX v1.2.2
entry.content:
## [v1.2.2] - 2026-06-26
### Added:
- Re-added traps during demo mode. - The adventure field is now open during demo mode if the "all open" setting is enabled. - Entering blocked levels will no longer send you back, you can now enter the level. - This won't be taken into account for logic.

entry.title: Ship of Harkinian v1.4.1
entry.content:
Our previous release introduced a new system to filter out characters which are not supported in the Ocarina of Time font during save file creation. However due to an issue in our supported character table all lowercase L's were getting cut too.
This patch release fixes this issue and should be backwards compatible with previously generated 1.4.0 multiworlds. You will have to create a new save file in order in order for the changes to take effect on an existing slot.
## Full change log - Fixed lowercase L's being seen as an unsupported character. - Fixed logic issue with the wolfos grotto in the sacred forest meadow. - Fixed logic issue with returning from the Deku tree boss room to the basement.

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v1.0.1
entry.content:
A few generation related fixes here... The client is compatible with 1.0.X generated seeds.
Download a new apworld and options template below and have a good one! If this is your first time playing MKDD AP, here's the [setup guide](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/blob/main/docs/en_Setup.md) and [readme](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash).
## Fixes * Fix require star logic (sand pit check) * Fix spamming debug data when generating * Fix determinism issues * Fix generation sometimes failing at sand pit
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v1.0.0...v1.0.1

entry.title: IslesOfSeaAndSky v1.0.0
entry.content:
This is a fork from the work Kim Delicious has done here: https://github.com/Kim-Delicious/Archipelago_IslesOfSeaAndSky
# It is similar to their latest version, which means it still requires downpatching the game to 1.2b to work.
The 1.0.0 version number has nothing to do with stability or features, I just decided to change the versioning style used in the original project.
# Changelog - Fixed a crash that happened when paired with certain games in multiworlds - Add a note sanity setting, courtesy of Cuberyl - Added a few Universal Tracker conveniences: - Yaml-less support - Migrated to rule builder, which means /explain works out of the box

entry.title: Lethal Company v0.7.12b0
entry.content:
Mod: * filler usage is now properly networked * removed unnecessary code for completing quota events (event locations don't exist past generation)
Apworld: * the company building is now logically required to get the kidnapper fox and vain shroud entries * players can now choose how many quota locations can be in a single multiworld sphere [@donedonedone278] #29
Other: * created an example csproj.user for contributors * created build scripts to make testing easier for contributors [@donedonedone278] #29 Mod version 0.7.12 works with apworld versions 0.7.11 - 0.7.12

entry.title: The Sims 4 v2.0.0
entry.content:
This release changes quite a bit about the APWorld. It adds a number of new features that are only meant for people to use if they're prepared for an unfinished experience.
## New additions/changes - DLC Skills - Multiple career support
In addition to the major features, lots has changed on the backend. The rules have been refactored to ensure better maintainability in the future, as well as some client fixes and squashed bugs.
This release is NOT backwards compatible with older games or sessions. A lot has changed, and attempting to use the new APWorld and client with the older game mod will result in issues. Please finish all your existing game before updating!
If you're wondering where the DLC options are, they're currently hidden because they're not prepared for general usage just yet. The DLC Skills have been tested and do work, but due to a lack of being able to lock most of them on the mod side, these options aren't ready for primetime despite being the headlining major feature for this update. We will update you when they become finished to a point where the experience doesn't suck.
This release should fix some stability issues, but there are still some glaring bugs that haven't yet been fixed due to an unfortunate series of events that are not of importance here.
## What's Changed * Minor bugfixes by @silasary in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/1 * Select Multiple Careers by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/3 * WIP DLC skills by @silasary in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/2 * Merge Main (Aug 12) by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/4 * Merge Main (Aug 16) by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/5 * Don't make location sending O(n^2) by @silasary in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/7 * merge main (again) by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/12 * Fix client launch missing args by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/13 * merge main (again) by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/17 * Add CodeRabbit configuration by @coderabbitai[bot] in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/18 * Sims 4: Rules Refactor Part 1 by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/14 * Added a simple example for the set path by @mads-gregersen in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/20 * Add an additional check that /set_path was given an absolute file path by @silasary in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/22 * try merging main by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/28 * Sims4 dev by @benny-dreamly in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/30
## New Contributors * @silasary made their first contribution in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/1 * @benny-dreamly made their first contribution in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/3 * @coderabbitai[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/18 * @mads-gregersen made their first contribution in https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/pull/20
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Simsipelago/Archipelago/compare/1.7.5...2.0.0

entry.title: Age Of Mythology Retold v1.3.4
entry.content:
## Small Improvements and New Options - 👁️ New option to exclude 30. All is Not Lost from the pool. This is the scenario that has a **mandatory** 20 minute wait 😬 - 💎 New option to add gems as filler items. This will only be relevant in huge worlds, but in those, you can take them to shop E to buy more cards - ⚙️ Better generation. Improvements to generation difficulty slope and more reliable generation, especially in huge multi-worlds. - 🐧 Better Linux support. Hopefully, now works correctly on Linux and Steam Deck.
## 👍 Fully compatible with current games v1.1+
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1-800-thewolf/AoM-Archipelago/compare/v1.3.3...v1.3.4

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank v0.2.1b0
entry.content:
Generation stability improvements:
- Starting items now work again - Progressive packs should no longer cause generation failures - Standardised the naming convention of items and locations to match the ingame naming (mostly) - Added a mwgg compatible manifest - Gold weapons now actually put respective checks in logic if progressive weapons are set to normal (like the gold bomb glove will make Novalis Cave gold bolt shown in logic) - Extra weapons that made sense were added to the ranged weapons and explosive weapons logic requirements

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v86
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.3): - "alternates" for logic - other changes to logic: locations are removed if any required region is excluded, levels detected differently, gear licenses not required if the setting is off - integrate always on level - The Pre-Sequel initial integration - Tracker tab in Client if UT is intalled

entry.title: Dead Cells v0.1.5
entry.content:
New Quality of Life: - Improved UI responsiveness. Tested on FHD (1920x1080) and 4K (3840x2160) - Added controller support for the Archipelago menu
Launcher Changes: - New button to download the latest version of DCCM - New option to help with GOG version support - Improved .NET 10 installation
Bug Fixes: - Maria's Cat (NPC) still spawning after sending Maria's Cat check - Boss Rush pop-up appearing at each run start - Compatibility issues for the new major version of DCCM
Apworld Changes by Rayze: - Fixed Parry Shield missing Ram and Spider Rune rules - Added rule for Acceptance route - Abyssal Trident missing a Ram Rune rule
Compatible with apworld 0.1.4 and newer

entry.title: Anno 1800 v1.3.0
entry.content:
In this release, the progressive unlocks system is introduced: any chain of upgraded buildings will now generate as progressive unlocks (unless turned off). This means less getting stuck with a large warehouse without the medium one - warehouses will always be received in order. This should greatly help with a smoother game experience, but also increases the need for a poptracker. Tasks for later...
Additionally, some option presets have been added and a slew of bugs were fixed.
Last but not least, the loading time of the mod was reduced my a factor of ~20x! On my system it went from ~34s for a max settings randomizer to a good bit under 2s.
### Changes * Added progressive unlocks and an option to turn them off (on per default) * Check the items page for a full list! * Refactored some internal systems along the way, dropping ~500 auto-generated scripts from the mod * Added an option to exclude all special recipe checks (meaning those with more advanced unlock conditions) * Improved mod loading time by a factor of around ~20x * Added option presets * Added a trigger to locally release all items even without AP server * Fixed locations requiring buildings in multiple regions not checking requirements for the secondary regions * Fixed generation error when enabling Land of Lions without The Passage * Fixed Hacienda blank farm and blank brewery always being unlocked * Fixed Hacienda store room not counting as providing enough storage for the Grand Stadium * Fixed strange behaviour when starting a second new game without closing the game first * Improved documentation
This release **is not compatible** with older multiworlds.
### [Game Page](<https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.0/worlds/a1800/docs/en_Anno%201800.md>) | [Setup](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.0/worlds/a1800/docs/setup_en.md) | [Items](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.0/worlds/a1800/docs/items_en.md) | [Locations](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.0/worlds/a1800/docs/locations_en.md) | [Roadmap](https://github.com/Dark-Listener/ArchipelagoA1800/blob/release/v1.3.0/worlds/a1800/docs/roadmap_en.md)
Find the apworld and a several template yamls below.

entry.title: Dwarf Fortress v1.2.0
entry.content:
## New Features
### New Dwarfipelago logo A brand new logo designed by jjjj12212 has been introduced
- The [AP] button in the top left has been moved to the bottom of the screen, using this logo - Logo has also been added to the APworld client icon
### Merchant's Shop A full in-game shop system powered by minted coins. Spend coins to buy AP items directly inside your fortress.
- Shop slots are gated by **Merchant's Coffers** - 10 slots unlock per coffer received (up to 50 slots across 5 coffers) - The shop requires a **Merchant Shrine** to be active - a temple zone with a designated altar, coffer box, and bars - Players can choose their shrine bar material in the Shop tab: **Gold (5 bars)**, **Silver (10 bars)**, or **Coke (20 bars)** - Shop slots display item name, destination player, price, and buy status (BUY / SOLD / PENDING / LOCKED / need coins) - The Shop tab is always visible in the panel so shrine status is shown before the AP client connects - Shop is gated in AP logic behind the ability to mint coins (metal-smelting or Coins Permit depending on options)
### Slay Megabeast Goal A full war campaign added as a playable goal. Build up military readiness and summon a Megabeast to fight.
- Player summons the beast from the **War tab** in the panel - it is not auto-spawned - **Wave scheduler**: siege waves arrive every 2-4 months leading up to the climax - **Warband spawner**: enemy warbands spawn with curated gear appropriate to difficulty - **Breach climax**: the megabeast arrives as a destructive and foreboding foe - **Ramping rewards**: end game gear, bonus rewards, and a special commander for any and all threats - **War Effort section** added to the panel with readiness status - Megabeast goal now flagged as **Hard** in options; Population Boom flagged as **Unstable** - **Legendary Wealth** is now the default goal
### Skillsanity Dwarves leveling their skills are AP location checks.
- Complete runtime detection and check firing for all skill advancement - Configurable skill groups (Easy / Medium / All / Choose), max level cap, and incoming-dwarf level mechanic - Skills tab added to the panel showing your progress toward each skill level threshold - **Crafting Permits** now validates against Skillsanity or Craftsanity location counts
### Progressive Mining Depth Mining depth gating replaced with **cavern-progress checks**.
- Delve-depth checks retired in favour of tracking cavern breaches (First Cavern → Second Cavern → Third Cavern → Magma Sea → The Circus) - Cavern checks chain in strict depth order in AP logic
### DFHack Build Menu & Workshop Overlays Two new overlays provide real-time visual feedback without leaving the game.
- **Blueprint overlay**: the Build menu reds out any workshop or furnace you haven't received the blueprint for yet - **Permit overlay**: workshop and furnace task lists red out crafts locked behind a Crafting Permit you haven't received, showing a `[Requires X Permit]` note - matching DF's own locked-item style - Both overlays fire on Workshop, Furnace, and Work Orders screens
---
## Fixes
### Production & Check Counting - **First Gem Cut** now fires for cut glass (not only cut stone gems) - **Metal craft counts**, **First Trap Built**, and **First Mechanism Made** fixed - **Coke** now counted with the correct reaction names (`*_TO_COKE`) - **Traction benches** counted from their produced item (not job type) - **Clay/ceramic Kiln crafts** (bricks, jugs, pots, hives, statues) now counted correctly - **First Bed Made** gated on Carpenter's Workshop Blueprint - **Sold an Artifact** location now properly gated in AP logic - **Screw Press** and **Soap Maker's Workshop** blueprints now properly block construction — both were silently ungated because they moved to `df.workshop_type.Custom` in this DF version and were no longer in the hardcoded workshop enum
### Megabeast / Military - Training Completed no longer fires on fortress load from dwarf embark skills - Barracks / Training checks gated on metal-making ability - Megabeast spawn guaranteed (whoops this was broken this whole time...)
### Dwarf Names - Spawned dwarves now receive a proper **first name** drawn from the Dwarven language translation table, displayed without quotes - Spawned dwarves now display **Dwarfipelago** as their surname so AP-sent dwarves are identifiable at a glance
### Logic / Rules - `Sold an Artifact` ungated rule fixed - Bone-based logic corrected - Ambusher skill requires crossbows and bolts in logic - Wrong variable in Skillsanity options corrected - RotGK (Remains of the Great King) maximum count fix
### World Generation - World gen preset rewritten and moved to AP client `/dfinstall` command for cleaner install flow
---

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.11.0
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.11.0 This update is NOT compatible with worlds generated on previous versions!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md). Development on the Itch.io version of Casualties: Unknown has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
@AnAverageArceus made their first contribution in https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/pull/46
# Additions - Added Craftsanity locations and Recipe items for Demo 7 items [APWorld Change] (thanks to @AnAverageArceus ) - Written Notes left inside lifepods now contain Archipelago hints - These hints are generated at the start of each layer, and will only show uncollected locations in your game # Changes - Added FOCUSED to the Difficult Moodlesanity Exclusions preset - Added Palpitations to the Minimal Moodlesanity Exclusions preset - Removed the Hope and Despair filler items [APWorld Change] # Fixes - Fixed over half the Craftsanity locations sending the wrong item [APWorld Change] (thanks to @AnAverageArceus ) - Fixed over half the Recipe items giving the wrong recipe [APWorld Change] (thanks to @AnAverageArceus ) - Fixed the `Saline bottle Recipe` item not doing anything - Logic changes to account for Titanium now only spawning in Overgrown Depths [APWorld Change] - Fixed SleepLink checking for the RingLink YAML option, causing SleepLink to only turn on if RingLink was on # Known Issues - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed - Loading a save can cause logic issues
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.10.0...v0.11.0

entry.title: A Link Between Worlds v0.3.2
entry.content: This version is backward compatible with 0.3.x. - Fixes a bug where a newly created save file may be reported as invalid - Change to client to prevent possible item duplication

entry.title: Donkey Kong Country 2 v3.1.3
entry.content: <- messed up his ctrl+F ## Info * [Info](<https://thelx5.github.io/dkc2/index.html>) * [Trivia (REQUIRED TO PLAY)](<https://github.com/TheLX5/DKC2-Trivia/releases/latest>) ## Changes * Fixed logic related to Clapper and Diddy on Loose and Expert difficulties

entry.title: Muse Dash v1.5.34
entry.content:
# Changes - Update songs to 8th Anniversary Muse Plus.
# Installation ## Melonloader *Melonloader is required to play with this mod. However reinstalling it is not required on update.*
> You can find Muse Dash's folder by finding the game in your steam library, right clicking it and choosing *Manage→Browse Local Files*.
### Windows 1. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.exe` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. 2. Select Muse Dash in the list of games. - If Muse Dash does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `MuseDash.exe`. 3. Click install. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
### Linux 1. Navigate to Muse Dash on steam, open properties and add the following to Launch Options: `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="version=n,b" %command%` 2. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.Linux` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. - You may need to give it permissions to execute. 3. Select Muse Dash in the list of games. - If Muse Dash does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `MuseDash.exe`. 4. Click install. On first run, melonloader may install dotnet 6 in order to run. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
### Mod Install 1.Download `ArchipelagoMuseDash.zip`. 2. Head to the Muse Dash folder and open up `/mods/`. If this folder does not exist, run the game and it should appear. 3. Extract the contents of the .zip file into mods. Ensure the files are not in a subfolder, this mod is not setup for that yet. 4. Run the game. If a new button appears on the start screen the mod was installed correctly.

entry.title: NSMBW v0.2.0
entry.content:
# New Super Mario Bros Wii v0.2.0 ## Content - More movement - New Filler and Trap Items - Deathlink-groups - More quality of life options - Quality of life patches - Auto save - Items / Locations have better names - More client commands - Reworked logic backend to give access to a readable /explain
## Bug fixes - Deathlink works - 4-A and 6-A are now accessible - Game froze on death in a few levels - You can now select both .iso and .wbfs as a game file - Incorrect Logic - Logic now displays correctly with UT /explain - Inventory power-ups now work on other game version - Added error for Linux user that it requires root access - Castles did not get marked as completed
## New setup Change the following setting in dolphin for a better experience: - Open dolphin, go to options → Configuration → Interface → Hotkeys Require Window Focus → off - this is IMPORTANT for death-link and movement to work correctly

entry.title: YAYARG v2.5.0
entry.content:
## Yet Another YARG AP V2.5.5
### Client Changes - Update to YARG V15 - Rework menu buttons to use the new header system
Tested against [YARG nightly b3819](https://github.com/YARC-Official/YARG-Bleedingedge/releases/tag/b3819) ***Newer version may be incompatible.***
This client is compatible with worlds generated on V2.5.0 and up.
Setup Guide: https://github.com/Thedrummonger/Archipelago/blob/YARGV2/worlds/yayarg/docs/guide_en.md

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Installation
1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory. 2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game. 3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar). 4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched RomFS — see the [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md) for the click-by-click guide.
See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md) for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).
## What's Changed * Catch unrecognized-romfs patch failures and surface patcher status by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/130 * Runtime bridge IP + prebuilt sysmodule: /setup needs no toolchain by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/132 * build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 6 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/131
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.14.2...v0.15.0

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.9.5
entry.content:
*Wow so many pretty colors*
## New Features * Color coded regions * Region progress section in client * Reworked regions section of YAML generator * Better YAML generator export validation
## Bug Fixes * Fixed a bug with filler population in world gen * Fixed a bug with stale play state sometimes persisting on reconnect

entry.title: Cookie Clicker v0.8.6
entry.content:
Hotfix release, only the client script is updated 0.8.6 is retrocompatible with 0.8.5
## HOTFIX - Fix an issue where buildings couldn't be unlocked when Progressive Buildings were not enabled #8

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.6.0
entry.content: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.5.0...v0.6.0

entry.title: Phoenotopia: Awakening v0.3.0
entry.content:
Bug fix patch - 0.3.1

Minor patch to fix a couple of bugs.

Bug fixes:

- Fixed crash when walking into the shooting gallery in Atai with the minigames setting disabled. - "Sand Drifts - Stealer bird plains floor patch" check will no longer give you the item twice. Full patch notes of 0.3 can be found [here](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/releases/tag/v0.3.0)

entry.title: Ape Escape 3 v2.0.6
entry.content: # Changelog ## Game - When having entered Midnight Bay - Sewers without a Water Net, the client will now respawn the player to Midnight Bay - Front Port ## Client - Client now checks the game state more frequently (0.5s -> 0.1s) - PGC Progress is now sent to server DataStorage (for trackers) ## Universal Tracker - Locations are now sorted by Region when listed under UT (@Fafale)

entry.title: NSMBW v0.2.1
entry.content: ## New Super Mario Bros Wii v0.2.1 # Bugfix - Fixed so reveres movements works - Compatible with multiworld and yaml generated on 0.2.0 - To fix issue just receive another reverse movement trap

entry.title: Madou Monogatari Hanamaru Daiyouchienji v106
entry.content:
New Feature: - Uses rules builder now.
Bugfixes: - Fix several logic problems.

entry.title: Civilization V v0.10.3
entry.content:
**Fixes**: - Check that weight options have at least one non-zero key when that option is used for generation.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1313e/Civ-V-AP-World/compare/v0.10.2...v0.10.3

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.6.2
entry.content: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.6.1...v0.6.2

entry.title: Feeding Frenzy 2 v0.6
entry.content: ## Quick Patch * Fix for fullscreen where some user's setups used negative coordinates * Logic fix: accessing level 58 requires dash

entry.title: Wargroove 2 v1.1.7
entry.content: # Features - New map by KoiiBlitz: Giant Issue

entry.title: Pokemon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire v0.2.0
entry.content:
# New Features * New Goal Option: Medals * When enabled, Pokédex Medals are added to the item pool, and receiving a certain amount of them is required for goal * Goal Trigger * Choose when goal should be checked, either at end of ball or after defeating Groudon/Kyogre/Rayquaza * `/check_goal` Quickly check goal progress * A message will now appear in-game when items are received from other players. * A message will now appear in-game when goal is completed. * Egg Bunches 1-4 have been replaced with the following: * Egg Bunch (Forest): Wurmple, Ralts, Oddish * Egg Bunch (Cave): Whismur, Aron, Zubat, Bagon * Egg Bunch (Mountain): Spoink, Shuppet, Chimecho, Natu * Egg Bunch (Desert): Sandshrew, Spinda, Trapinch, Phanpy * Egg Bunch (Sea): Snorunt, Spheal, Corsola, Horsea
# Bug Fixes * Pichu can now be DexNav'd with less than 100 Pokémon registered. * Fixed Special Guest dex entries being offset by 1 * Fixed attract mode incrementing counters for ball upgrades/bumpers * Fixed being able to activate e-Reader cards without actually owning the e-Reader cards * Fixed Clamperl requiring a Fire Stone for evolution, rather than a Link Cable

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Installation
1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory. 2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game. 3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar). 4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched RomFS — see the [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md) for the click-by-click guide.
See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md) for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).
## What's Changed * fix(transport-rando): never shuffle the Itorash capsule rides (Hanubia/Raven Beak crash) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/133 * Repair PopTracker logic export: rebuild compiled_rules.json from the graph by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/134
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.15.0...v0.16.0

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Installation
1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory. 2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game. 3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar). 4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched RomFS — see the [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md) for the click-by-click guide.
See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md) for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).
## What's Changed * fix: Dread client not connecting — re-assert bridge sysmodule + Bridge IP override by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/135
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.16.0...v0.17.0

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0
entry.content:
## Notice This version is a beta. Meaning, this is meant to test the new features and it's behavior. Do not submit to public syncs and asyncs unless you want to take the risk of any issues that may occur when playing it. Play it at your own risk! I am not responsible for any issues that may occur if you decide to bring this version to public sessions.
### Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, Mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, In familiar spots or shuffled flow!
### Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, Like tiny flies removed before repeat!

entry.title: Crash2 v0.4.0
entry.content:
### New Option: - Life count checks can now be set using both a range and custom values - Useful if you want to add a lot of life count checks
### Bug Fixes: - Fixed typos causing 3 life sanity checks to not be placed by the apworld - This also fixes the life sanity checks after Bee-Having being off by 1 ID - Fixed the client crashing when no life count checks are enabled - Fixed life bundles not sending when fruit sanity is enabled
### Known Issues: - Generating a multiworld with multiple Crash 2 yamls will error if any life count checks are enabled - Life sanity lives are no longer perma-collected - Also everything mentioned in v0.4.0 known issues

entry.title: Donkey Kong Toluca v1.0.0
entry.content: "I'm happy with the state of the APWorld" kind of update # Changes * New options to allow unlocking `Progressive Vehicle` items other than multiworld items * Via Banana Bird count * Via worlds unlocked * Swanky's Sideshow games can be valid locations (beat each 3 per world) * This also removes the bear coin cost to enter a game * KONG letters progress is saved per level upon collecting them * Bear Brothers' trade sequence can be shuffled * Adds 3 locations to the Banana Bird as locations option * Removes giving Barnacle a shell as a requirement for the rare flower to appear on the map * Rare flower no longer checks for Razor Ridge completion, only Barbos * Mirror item in Bazaar expects you to reach either Cove or Mekanos to consider it in logic (no one wants to farm coins) * Added a label to every world that informs what's the current progress on level clears and how many are required to fight the world's boss * Added an option to swap Kaos Kore and Knautilus levels * Goal option is updated to reflect that the goal is now either Kastle KAOS or Knautilus instead of KAOS Kore or Krematoa * Implemented more `cog_placement` options: * `krematoa_level_clear`: Places them at level ends in Krematoa * `krematoa_anywhere`: Places them anywhere in Krematoa. Includes Extra Cogs. * Added an option to have additional Banana Birds, Cogs and Bonus Coins in the item pool * Added the ability to change the Kongs' palettes * Generator no longer places Cogs if Knautilus isn't a valid goal * Allow setting to 0 the required level clears per world * Fixed an issue with levels on Krematoa trying to get alternate palettes after Knautilus surfaces * Level ID is now sent via Data Storage (for PopTracker auto tabbing) * A few logic changes

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Spirit Tracks v0.7.8a0
entry.content:
compatible with seeds generated in v7.x
## New Features - Added Rule Builder Logic support for AP 0.6.7+. Main benefit is that you can use the UT command /explain to see the logic for a particular location or region. Also speeds up gen slightly and is easier to work with, and allows for exporting logic for potential future tracker stuff! - Added /carrot_asked command that prints the debug output from the current room, even if not running debug launcher ## Bugfixes - Fixed typo in flags for s Mayscore portal to ocean portal with portal unlock items - Fixed snow tracks grouping typo - Tweaked respawns in Staven's room - Added detection and error message for trying to play with rom version 1.1 - Allowed picking up teacher with fire glyph - Fixed total rabbits not sending properly - Added a hitbox to Hyrule Castle 2f indoor chest - Entering the ToS 31F no longer steals your tears of light - An Evil Train now always spawns underwater - Fixed model swap for Bunnio's Rabbit net - Made sure you can pick up Joe in outset after already taking him to Beedle - Added delay reset to rabbit rewards - Stopped Kenzo from leaving tp early if visited Anouki - Fixed a Kenzo bug in AV - Changed some trading post event logic - Treasure removed by delay reset now removes itself properly - Tears now reload on all ToS floors that don't remove them, allowing you to grab a new phantom after entering glyph rooms. - Going north on W Wooded Temple Tracks without snow glyph now bounces you cause there are no tracks - Buying bombs/quivers from shops no longer sends their matching ammo location. Also fixed for if those locs are their vanilla items - Saving and quitting in Staven's room now puts you in the room before, preventing a softlock from Zelda despawning during the fight. - Fixed some faulty goals, Including Staven, Vulcano and Skeldritch - Expanded hitbox for rabbit haven island chest - Fixed bad address on fire realm ice crash fix - Added killing the marine temple snapper Without sword to hard logic (requires setting up a hit before entering the arena with boomerang or bombs) - Added getting wooded temple boss key without whirlwind to hard logic - Fixed some shop detection in Goron shop - Fixed Snurglar keys sometimes sending multiple locations - Fixed Ocean Source persisting after Cactops - Made sure goal dungeons are always in the required dungeon pool, even when required dungeons are 0
Known Issues: - There are still some occasional fill bugs I've been struggling to track down

entry.title: PokePark v1.2.3
entry.content:
## What's Changed * bugfix: changed Groudon Location region to magma zone by @Mekurushi in https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/pull/124
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/compare/1.2.2...1.2.3

entry.title: Tevi v0.7.3
entry.content:
## DLC Has **no** logic and is not included yet - Enable teleportation from DLC areas before DLC final boss is defeated
## Change log
- Popup options moved into the Mod and can toggled on and off from the randomizer menu - Shops revert and currently sell their items for 3x the original prices - Received Archipelago item counter is saved even when a disconnect happens - Arcade rewards fixed - Mia shop item missing fixed - Cloister - Crouching Bunny -> missing jump height - Ian Sho Bonus 15 to 18 -> bad logic fixed - Verglas Village to Snowveil -> slide included - Dreamless Depths to Dream palace -> missing bombs - DreamKeeper - MP Quicken: Sugar Rush -> missing slide - DreamKeeper - Alius fight -> removed bomb requirement - DreamKeeper - Grip Sole Boots -> removed bomb requirement - CopperWood to Industry -> missing connection added

entry.title: Civilization V v0.10.4
entry.content:
**Changes/Improvements**: - Sending an item now also sends an alert to the player with the item sent.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1313e/Civ-V-AP-World/compare/v0.10.3...v0.10.4

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.6.3
entry.content:
This release changes from Science Mode to career mode and adds contract
See the discord for more details on what is new here
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.6.2...v0.6.3

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Installation
1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory. 2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game. 3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar). 4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched RomFS — see the [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md) for the click-by-click guide.
See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md) for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).
## What's Changed * fix(patcher): re-assert rom:/ap_config.json on auto-patch by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/137
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.17.0...v0.17.1

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.1.1
entry.content: - Fixes to BITFS logic. - Renames a PSS 1-Up location name.

entry.title: Pokemon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire v0.2.1
entry.content: # Bug Fixes * Fixed Armaldo logically evolving from Cradily and not Anorith.

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.6.4
entry.content: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.6.3...v0.6.4
